# [Feature/Task] Checklist

**Feature**: [Name of feature or task]  
**Owner**: [Team/Person responsible]  
**Sprint/Milestone**: [Sprint number or milestone name]  
**Start Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]  
**Target Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]

---

## 🎯 Quick Status Overview

```
Progress: [█████████░] 90% Complete

✅ Planning Complete     🔄 Development In Progress     ❌ Testing Pending
✅ Design Approved       🔄 Code Review               ❌ Documentation
✅ Requirements Clear    ✅ Implementation            ❌ Deployment
```

**Current Phase**: [Planning | Development | Testing | Review | Deployment]  
**Next Milestone**: [Description] - Due: [YYYY-MM-DD]

---

## 📋 Pre-Development Checklist

### Requirements & Planning
- [ ] **Requirements Documented** - Clear acceptance criteria defined
- [ ] **User Stories Created** - All user scenarios covered
- [ ] **Technical Approach Approved** - Architecture decisions made
- [ ] **Dependencies Identified** - All blockers and prerequisites noted
- [ ] **Effort Estimated** - Time and complexity assessed
- [ ] **Risk Assessment Complete** - Potential issues identified

### Design & Architecture
- [ ] **UI/UX Design Approved** - Visual designs finalized
- [ ] **Database Schema Designed** - Data model defined
- [ ] **API Specification Created** - Input/output contracts defined
- [ ] **Component Structure Planned** - Code organization decided
- [ ] **Security Considerations** - Security implications reviewed
- [ ] **Performance Requirements** - Performance targets set

---

## 🔨 Development Checklist

### Core Implementation
- [ ] **Database Changes** - Schema updates implemented
- [ ] **Backend Logic** - Server-side functionality complete
- [ ] **Frontend Components** - UI components implemented
- [ ] **State Management** - Data flow and state handling
- [ ] **Validation Logic** - Input validation and error handling
- [ ] **Integration Points** - Third-party services integrated

### Code Quality
- [ ] **Code Review Complete** - Peer review conducted
- [ ] **Type Safety Verified** - TypeScript errors resolved
- [ ] **Linting Passes** - Code style standards met
- [ ] **Performance Optimized** - Efficiency improvements made
- [ ] **Security Review** - Security vulnerabilities addressed
- [ ] **Accessibility Checked** - WCAG compliance verified

---

## 🧪 Testing Checklist

### Unit Testing
- [ ] **Component Tests** - Individual component functionality
- [ ] **Store Tests** - State management and business logic
- [ ] **Utility Function Tests** - Helper function validation
- [ ] **Schema Validation Tests** - Data validation rules
- [ ] **Error Handling Tests** - Error scenarios covered
- [ ] **Edge Case Tests** - Boundary conditions tested

### Integration Testing
- [ ] **API Integration Tests** - End-to-end data flow
- [ ] **Component Integration** - Component interaction testing
- [ ] **Authentication Flow** - Login/logout scenarios
- [ ] **Real-time Features** - Subscription and update testing
- [ ] **Cross-browser Testing** - Multiple browser compatibility
- [ ] **Mobile Responsiveness** - Device compatibility

### User Acceptance Testing
- [ ] **Happy Path Testing** - Primary user flows
- [ ] **Error Scenario Testing** - Error handling from user perspective
- [ ] **Performance Testing** - Load and stress testing
- [ ] **Accessibility Testing** - Screen reader and keyboard navigation
- [ ] **User Feedback Collected** - Stakeholder approval obtained
- [ ] **Bug Fixes Complete** - All critical issues resolved

---

## 📚 Documentation Checklist

### Technical Documentation
- [ ] **Code Comments Added** - Complex logic documented
- [ ] **API Documentation Updated** - Endpoint documentation current
- [ ] **Database Documentation** - Schema changes documented
- [ ] **Architecture Documentation** - Design decisions recorded
- [ ] **Deployment Guide Updated** - Installation instructions current
- [ ] **Troubleshooting Guide** - Common issues and solutions

### User Documentation
- [ ] **User Guide Updated** - End-user instructions
- [ ] **Help Content Added** - In-app help and tooltips
- [ ] **Release Notes Prepared** - Feature announcement ready
- [ ] **Training Materials** - Internal team documentation
- [ ] **FAQ Updated** - Common questions addressed
- [ ] **Video Tutorials** - If applicable, walkthrough videos

---

## 🚀 Deployment Checklist

### Pre-Deployment
- [ ] **Environment Setup** - Staging environment configured
- [ ] **Database Migration Plan** - Data migration strategy ready
- [ ] **Backup Strategy** - Rollback plan prepared
- [ ] **Monitoring Setup** - Logging and alerting configured
- [ ] **Performance Baseline** - Pre-deployment metrics captured
- [ ] **Stakeholder Notification** - Team informed of deployment

### Deployment Process
- [ ] **Code Deployed** - Latest code in production
- [ ] **Database Migrated** - Schema changes applied
- [ ] **Configuration Updated** - Environment variables set
- [ ] **Cache Cleared** - CDN and application caches refreshed
- [ ] **Health Checks Pass** - All systems operational
- [ ] **Monitoring Active** - Metrics and alerts functioning

### Post-Deployment
- [ ] **Smoke Tests Pass** - Critical functionality verified
- [ ] **Performance Metrics** - Response times within targets
- [ ] **Error Rates Normal** - No significant error increase
- [ ] **User Feedback Positive** - No major user complaints
- [ ] **Team Notified** - Successful deployment communicated
- [ ] **Documentation Updated** - Production docs current

---

## 🔍 Review & Sign-off

### Technical Review
- [ ] **Code Review Approved** - Senior developer sign-off
- [ ] **Security Review Passed** - Security team approval
- [ ] **Performance Review** - Performance targets met
- [ ] **Architecture Review** - Design consistency maintained

### Business Review
- [ ] **Product Owner Approval** - Requirements satisfaction confirmed
- [ ] **Stakeholder Sign-off** - Key stakeholders approve
- [ ] **User Acceptance** - End-user testing successful
- [ ] **Compliance Check** - Regulatory requirements met

---

### Technical Metrics

- **Reliability**: [Target uptime] - Actual: [X]%
- **Test Coverage**: [Target coverage] - Actual: [X]%
- **Code Quality**: [Target score] - Actual: [X]/10

### Business Metrics
- **User Adoption**: [Target usage] - Actual: [X]%
- **User Satisfaction**: [Target score] - Actual: [X]/10
- **Feature Utilization**: [Target engagement] - Actual: [X]%
- **Business Impact**: [Target improvement] - Actual: [X]%
